verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus :  Custodite judicium, et facite justitiam,  quia juxta est salus mea ut veniat,  et justitia mea ut reveletur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה שִׁמְר֥וּ מִשְׁפָּ֖ט וַעֲשׂ֣וּ צְדָקָ֑ה כִּֽי־קְרוֹבָ֤ה יְשׁוּעָתִי֙ לָב֔וֹא וְצִדְקָתִ֖י לְהִגָּלֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord: Keep ye judgment, and do justice: for my salvation is near to come, and my justice to be revealed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra: pitäkäät oikeus, ja tehkäät vanhurskautta; sillä minun autuuteni on läsnä tulemassa, ja minun vanhurskauteni, että se ilmoitetaan.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, Keep ye judgment, and do justice: for my salvation is near to come, and my righteousness to be revealed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir qui facit hoc,  et filius hominis qui apprehendet istud,  custodiens sabbatum ne polluat illud,  custodiens manus suas ne faciat omne malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֤י אֱנוֹשׁ֙ יַֽעֲשֶׂה־זֹּ֔את וּבֶן־אָדָ֖ם יַחֲזִ֣יק בָּ֑הּ שֹׁמֵ֤ר שַׁבָּת֙ מֵֽחַלְּל֔וֹ וְשֹׁמֵ֥ר יָד֖וֹ מֵעֲשׂ֥וֹת כׇּל־רָֽע׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man that doth this, and the son of man that shall lay hold on this: that keepeth the sabbath from profaning it, that keepeth his hands from doing any evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se ihminen, joka sen tekee, ja se ihmisen lapsi, joka sen käsittää: että hän pitäis sabbatin, eikä sitä arkioksi tekisi, ja pidättäis kätensä, ettei hän mitään pahaa tekisi.
verses.king_james: Blessed is the man that doeth this, and the son of man that layeth hold on it; that keepeth the sabbath from polluting it, and keepeth his hand from doing any evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non dicat filius advenæ qui adhæret Domino, dicens :  Separatione dividet me Dominus a populo suo ;  et non dicat eunuchus :  Ecce ego lignum aridum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַל־יֹאמַ֣ר בֶּן־הַנֵּכָ֗ר הַנִּלְוָ֤ה אֶל־יְהֹוָה֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר הַבְדֵּ֧ל יַבְדִּילַ֛נִי יְהֹוָ֖ה מֵעַ֣ל עַמּ֑וֹ וְאַל־יֹאמַר֙ הַסָּרִ֔יס הֵ֥ן אֲנִ֖י עֵ֥ץ יָבֵֽשׁ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And let not the son of the stranger, that adhereth to the Lord, speak, saying: The Lord will divide and separate me from his people. And let not the eunuch say: Behold I am a dry tree.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja muukalainen, joka Herraan on suostunut, ei pidä sanoman: Herra kaiketi eroittaa minun kansastansa; ja kuohittu ei pidä sanoman: katso, minä olen kuiva puu.
verses.king_james: Neither let the son of the stranger, that hath joined himself to the Lord, speak, saying, The Lord hath utterly separated me from his people: neither let the eunuch say, Behold, I am a dry tree.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus eunuchis :  Qui custodierint sabbata mea,  et elegerint quæ ego volui,  et tenuerint fœdus meum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־כֹ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה לַסָּֽרִיסִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר יִשְׁמְרוּ֙ אֶת־שַׁבְּתוֹתַ֔י וּבָחֲר֖וּ בַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר חָפָ֑צְתִּי וּמַחֲזִיקִ֖ים בִּבְרִיתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord to the eunuchs, They that shall keep my sabbaths, and shall choose the things that please me, and shall hold fast my covenant:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra kuohituille: jotka minun sabbatini pitävät, ja valitsevat mitä minulle kelpaa, ja lujasti pitävät minun liittoni:
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord unto the eunuchs that keep my sabbaths, and choose the things that please me, and take hold of my covenant;

verses.latin_vulgate: dabo eis in domo mea et in muris meis  locum, et nomen  melius a filiis et filiabus :  nomen sempiternum dabo eis,  quod non peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֨י לָהֶ֜ם בְּבֵיתִ֤י וּבְחֽוֹמֹתַי֙ יָ֣ד וָשֵׁ֔ם ט֖וֹב מִבָּנִ֣ים וּמִבָּנ֑וֹת שֵׁ֤ם עוֹלָם֙ אֶתֶּן־ל֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֖ר לֹ֥א יִכָּרֵֽת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: I will give to them in my house, and within my walls, a place, and a name better than sons and daughters: I will give them an everlasting name which shall never perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä annan heille minun huoneessani ja muurissani paikan, ja paremman nimen kuin pojilla ja tyttärillä on; ijankaikkisen nimen minä heille annan, jota ei pidä hävitettämän.
verses.king_james: Even unto them will I give in mine house and within my walls a place and a name better than of sons and of daughters: I will give them an everlasting name, that shall not be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et filios advenæ, qui adhærent Domino,  ut colant eum, et diligant nomen ejus,  ut sint ei in servos ;  omnem custodientem sabbatum ne polluat illud,  et tenentem fœdus meum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י הַנֵּכָ֗ר הַנִּלְוִ֤ים עַל־יְהֹוָה֙ לְשָׁ֣רְת֔וֹ וּֽלְאַהֲבָה֙ אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֔ה לִֽהְי֥וֹת ל֖וֹ לַעֲבָדִ֑ים כׇּל־שֹׁמֵ֤ר שַׁבָּת֙ מֵֽחַלְּל֔וֹ וּמַחֲזִיקִ֖ים בִּבְרִיתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of the stranger that adhere to the Lord, to worship him, and to love his name, to be his servants: every one that keepeth the sabbath from profaning it, and that holdeth fast my covenant:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja muukalaisten lapsille, jotka Herraan suostuneet ovat häntä palvelemaan ja Herran nimeä rakastamaan, ja hänen palveliansa olemaan: jokainen heistä, joka sabbatin pitää, ettei hän sitä arkioksi tekisi, vaan pitäis lujasti minun liittoni,
verses.king_james: Also the sons of the stranger, that join themselves to the Lord, to serve him, and to love the name of the Lord, to be his servants, every one that keepeth the sabbath from polluting it, and taketh hold of my covenant;

verses.latin_vulgate: adducam eos in montem sanctum meum,  et lætificabo eos in domo orationis meæ ;  holocausta eorum et victimæ eorum placebunt mihi super altari meo,  quia domus mea domus orationis vocabitur  cunctis populis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲבִיאוֹתִ֞ים אֶל־הַ֣ר קׇדְשִׁ֗י וְשִׂמַּחְתִּים֙ בְּבֵ֣ית תְּפִלָּתִ֔י עוֹלֹתֵיהֶ֧ם וְזִבְחֵיהֶ֛ם לְרָצ֖וֹן עַֽל־מִזְבְּחִ֑י כִּ֣י בֵיתִ֔י בֵּית־תְּפִלָּ֥ה יִקָּרֵ֖א לְכׇל־הָעַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will bring them into my holy mount, and will make them joyful in my house of prayer: their holocausts, and their victims shall please me upon my altar: for my house shall be called the house of prayer, for all nations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne minä vien pyhän vuoreni tykö, ja ilahutan heitä minun rukoushuoneessani; heidän uhrinsa ja polttouhrinsa pitää minulle otolliset oleman minun alttarillani; sillä minun huoneeni pitää kutsuttaman kaikkein kansain rukoushuoneeksi.
verses.king_james: Even them will I bring to my holy mountain, and make them joyful in my house of prayer: their burnt offerings and their sacrifices shall be accepted upon mine altar; for mine house shall be called an house of prayer for all people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait Dominus Deus,  qui congregat dispersos Israël :  Adhuc congregabo ad eum  congregatos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְאֻם֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה מְקַבֵּ֖ץ נִדְחֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל ע֛וֹד אֲקַבֵּ֥ץ עָלָ֖יו לְנִקְבָּצָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord God, who gathereth the scattered of Israel, saith: I will still gather unto him his congregation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, Herra, joka Israelin hyljätyt kokoo, sanoo: minä tahdon vielä enemmän hänen koottuinsa joukkoon koota.
verses.king_james: The Lord God which gathereth the outcasts of Israel saith, Yet will I gather others to him, beside those that are gathered unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes bestiæ agri,  venite ad devorandum,  universæ bestiæ saltus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֖ל חַיְת֣וֹ שָׂדָ֑י אֵתָ֕יוּ לֶאֱכֹ֥ל כׇּל־חַיְת֖וֹ בַּיָּֽעַר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: All ye beasts of the field come to devour, all ye beasts of the forest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki pedot kedolla, tulkaat ja syökäät, ja kaikki pedot metsässä.
verses.king_james: All ye beasts of the field, come to devour, yea, all ye beasts in the forest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Speculatores ejus cæci omnes ;  nescierunt universi :  canes muti non valentes latrare,  videntes vana, dormientes,  et amantes somnia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֹפָ֞ו עִוְרִ֤ים כֻּלָּם֙ לֹ֣א יָדָ֔עוּ כֻּלָּם֙ כְּלָבִ֣ים אִלְּמִ֔ים לֹ֥א יוּכְל֖וּ לִנְבֹּ֑חַ הֹזִים֙ שֹֽׁכְבִ֔ים אֹהֲבֵ֖י לָנֽוּם׃
verses.douay_rheims: His watchmen are all blind, they are all ignorant: dumb dogs not able to bark, seeing vain things, sleeping and loving dreams.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki heidän vartiansa ovat sokiat, eikä tiedä mitään, he ovat kaikki mykät koirat, jotka ei voi haukkua; he ovat laiskat, he makaavat ja unta rakastavat.
verses.king_james: His watchmen are blind: they are all ignorant, they are all dumb dogs, they cannot bark; sleeping, lying down, loving to slumber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et canes imprudentissimi  nescierunt saturitatem ;  ipsi pastores  ignoraverunt intelligentiam :  omnes in viam suam declinaverunt ;  unusquisque ad avaritiam suam, a summo usque ad novissimum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַכְּלָבִ֣ים עַזֵּי־נֶ֗פֶשׁ לֹ֤א יָֽדְעוּ֙ שׇׂבְעָ֔ה וְהֵ֣מָּה רֹעִ֔ים לֹ֥א יָדְע֖וּ הָבִ֑ין כֻּלָּם֙ לְדַרְכָּ֣ם פָּנ֔וּ אִ֥ישׁ לְבִצְע֖וֹ מִקָּצֵֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And most impudent dogs, they never had enough: the shepherds themselves knew no understanding: all have turned aside into their own way, every one after his own gain, from the first even to the last.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he ovat häpeemättömät väkevät koirat, jotka ei ikänä taida tulla ravituiksi. Ei paimenet itsekään tiedä mitään eli ymmärrä; jokainen ottaa vaarin omasta tiestänsä, kukin noudattaa ahneuttansa hänen tilassansa.
verses.king_james: Yea, they are greedy dogs which can never have enough, and they are shepherds that cannot understand: they all look to their own way, every one for his gain, from his quarter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, sumamus vinum,  et impleamur ebrietate ;  et erit sicut hodie, sic et cras,  et multo amplius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵתָ֥יוּ אֶקְחָה־יַ֖יִן וְנִסְבְּאָ֣ה שֵׁכָ֑ר וְהָיָ֤ה כָזֶה֙ י֣וֹם מָחָ֔ר גָּד֖וֹל יֶ֥תֶר מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Come, let us take wine, and be filled with drunkenness: and it shall be as to day, so also to morrow, and much more.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkaat, ottakaamme viinaa ja juopukaamme, ja olkoon huomenna niinkuin tänäpänäkin, ja vielä paljo enempi.
verses.king_james: Come ye, say they, I will fetch wine, and we will fill ourselves with strong drink; and to morrow shall be as this day, and much more abundant.
